creator: keramida@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, 07 May 2008 14:01:57 +0900, Makoto Matsushita <matusita@jp.FreeBSD.org> wrote:
>> Now that `FILE *' are opaque pointers in CURRENT, we can't do pointer
>> arithmetic directly on (data1->dirty_file - data2->dirty_file) in
>> pdfobj.c, so take a detour through (void *) first.
>
> IIRC the change was backing out in latest 8-current.  Is it still an issue?

Hi Matsushita-san,

I have just rebuilt print/dvipdfmx with a base system from sources
checked out at 2008-05-09 20:38:25 +0000.

It compiles fine without my `patch-src-pdfobj.c' in files/, so we can
close the PR.

Thanks :-)
